message:
feat(gateway): implement audit trail hardening (flywheel_gateway-7ek)

Comprehensive audit system improvements for compliance and security:

Audit Types (audit.types.ts):
- Enhanced AuditAction types covering auth, user, agent, pipeline, bead,
  conflict, settings, data access, CAAM, DCG, and handoff operations
- ResourceType definitions for all system entities
- AuditActor, AuditOrg, AuditResource interfaces for detailed tracking
- AuditOperation with type, status, error tracking
- AuditChanges for before/after diff tracking
- AuditSearchQuery and AuditSearchResult for search API
- AuditExportOptions and AuditExportResult for export functionality
- RetentionPolicy interface with configurable retention durations
- DEFAULT_RETENTION_POLICIES for auth, data access, config, security events

Redaction Service (audit-redaction.service.ts):
- AuditRedactionService class for sensitive data sanitization
- Remove fields: password, secret, accessToken, refreshToken, etc.
- Mask patterns: email, phone, API keys, credit cards
- Hash fields: userId, accountId (for matching without exposing)
- Regex patterns: JWT tokens, AWS keys, credit cards, SSN
- Recursive object redaction
- containsSensitiveData() check function

Audit Routes (audit.ts):
- GET /audit - Search with filters (date range, action, resource, status)
- GET /audit/:id - Get specific audit event
- GET /audit/correlation/:correlationId - Get correlated events
- POST /audit/export - Create async export job (JSON, CSV, JSON lines)
- GET /audit/export/:jobId - Get export job status
- GET /audit/export/:jobId/download - Download export file
- GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /audit/retention-policies - CRUD retention policies
- GET /audit/analytics/summary - Analytics with date range filtering
- All responses have sensitive data redacted

Tests:
- 54 tests for redaction service (patterns, masking, hashing, recursion)
- 29 tests for audit routes (search, export, retention policies, analytics)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
